title: Your Certs Are Expiring: Digital Certificate Management Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains that expired digital certificates can disrupt websites, APIs, and enterprises. The content discusses what certificates are, the risks of shorter lifetimes, and why certificate lifecycle management is becoming a critical cybersecurity discipline.
